panels.title: COP (hourly)
panels.description: Coefficient of Performance — toplinska energija / utrošena električna energija po satu

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket('1h', time) AS time,
  (MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'unit_capacity'         THEN value END) - MIN(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'unit_capacity'         THEN value END)) /
  NULLIF(
    MAX(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'unit_power_consumption' THEN value END) - MIN(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'unit_power_consumption' THEN value END),
  0) AS "COP"
FROM analog_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_id = 'yutaki2016'
  AND metric_name IN ('unit_capacity', 'unit_power_consumption')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Water ΔT (outlet − inlet)
panels.description: Razlika temperature izlazne i ulazne vode. Normalno 5–10 °C.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(time, $__interval),
  AVG(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'water_outlet_temperature' THEN value END) -
  AVG(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'water_inlet_temperature'  THEN value END) AS "ΔT (°C)"
FROM analog_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_id = 'yutaki2016'
  AND metric_name IN ('water_outlet_temperature', 'water_inlet_temperature')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(time, $__interval),
  AVG(value) AS "Frekvencija (Hz)"
FROM analog_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_id = 'yutaki2016'
  AND metric_name = 'svc_compressor_frequency'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(time, $__interval),
  AVG(value) AS "Struja (A)"
FROM analog_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_id = 'yutaki2016'
  AND metric_name = 'svc_compressor_current'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(time, $__interval),
  AVG(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'outdoor_ambient_temperature'          THEN value END) AS "Vanjska (°C)",
  AVG(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'water_inlet_temperature'              THEN value END) AS "Ulazna voda (°C)",
  AVG(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'water_outlet_temperature'             THEN value END) AS "Izlazna voda (°C)",
  AVG(CASE WHEN metric_name = 'status_circuit1_water_heating_setpoint' THEN value END) AS "Setpoint (°C)"
FROM analog_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_id = 'yutaki2016'
  AND metric_name IN (
    'outdoor_ambient_temperature',
    'water_inlet_temperature',
    'water_outlet_temperature',
    'status_circuit1_water_heating_setpoint'
  )
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(time, $__interval),
  AVG(value) AS "Prostorija — BLE senzor (°C)"
FROM analog_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_id = '${sensor_mac}'
  AND metric_name = 'temperature'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(time, $__interval),
  AVG(value) AS "Thermostat setpoint (°C)"
FROM analog_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_id = 'yutaki2016'
  AND metric_name = 'status_circuit1_thermostat_setpoint'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  time,
  value AS "Operation State"
FROM status_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND device_id = 'yutaki2016'
  AND metric_name = 'operation_state'
ORDER BY time
